leakage_controls: F082 external validation uses train-only control source centroids, train-only image PCA, train-only delta calibration, and numeric PubChem property action descriptors. Treatment labels are used only for grouping, pairing, and relevance labels; no condition_key, biological_key, exact treatment one-hot, held-out target means, or pooled train+test statistics are model inputs.

descriptor_summary.action_descriptor: PubChem numeric molecular properties plus found/control flags; not exact treatment one-hot
